notes: Collector 0.1.1 reads sysfs hwmon directly and skips acpi_fan because this BIOS emits VFAN/FANL ACPI errors when acpi_fan fan1_input is read.
Do not restore sensors -j polling here; use abyss-machine cooling thermal-audit for richer thermal evidence.
Thermal thresholds mirror the thin-laptop cooling policy: stable 100-105C is monitored active range, above 105C is watch/routing territory, and critical/emergency classification starts at 109C.
